lemmas.body: l.length / 2 < l.length
lemmas.statement: (l : List T) (h1 : l.length / 2 < l.length) : (left l).length < l.length

lemmas.body: True
lemmas.statement: (l : List T) (p : l.length > 0) : (List.take (l.length / 2) l).length < l.length

lemmas.body: 0 < l.length ∧ 2 ≤ l.length
lemmas.statement: (l : List T) (h1 : 0 < l.length ∧ 2 ≤ l.length) : (right l).length < l.length

lemmas.body: True
lemmas.statement: (l : List T) (p : l.length > 1) : (List.drop (l.length / 2) l).length < l.length

lemmas.body: (h1 : (left (left l)).length < (left l).length) → (h2 : (left l).length < l.length) → (left (left l)).length < l.length
